examples: I stared fixedly at the statue.
She said nothing today but she sat and looked fixedly at the picture over the mantel.
Fancy his surprise when he noticed that these eyes moved and then stared fixedly at him.
Diller was disconcerted that Page, even as they talked, stared fixedly at the screen of his P.
The Indian-looking guy stared back at him fixedly: A station, he replied.
